body: not free as stated in the play store. 1 star just because of that
developer_reply: Thanks for your feedback. The app is free to use for editing individual files. Only the batch editing feature is part of the optional Pro upgrade. We'll also work on making this distinction clearer in the app and on the store page.

title: A clean and simple MP3 tag editor; just what I wanted.
body:
I’ve been looking for a straightforward MP3 tag editor for iPhone, and this is exactly what I wanted. No ads, no subscriptions, no AI trying to guess or “fix” my metadata — just a clean, manual editor that lets me change exactly what I want and nothing else.

The developer was also quick to respond to a question I had, which gave me confidence that the app is actively supported.

If you maintain your own music library and just want a simple, respectful tag editor, I highly recommend TagWeaver.
